content.title: Lpt apparatus maintained at transcript; LptD/LptE protein decline reveals Layer 3 tension
content.caption: Canonical Lpt CPM heatmap: MsbA-like CCNA_00307 UP (+0.89, FDR 0.01) and LptC-related CCNA_03716 UP (+0.56, FDR 0.005) at transcript; LptD protein −0.47 and LptE −0.78 against transcript. Single-replicate OM proteome; discordance unresolved.

speaker_notes_seed:
The NB04_lpt_apparatus_heatmap shows CPM (log2) for canonical Lpt components across the strain series. The visual story is asymmetric: MsbA-like CCNA_00307 (+0.89 transcript, FDR 0.01) and LptC-related CCNA_03716 (+0.56, FDR 0.005) are the upward outliers in the rescued strain — consistent with Uchendu 2026’s shared-component model for inner-membrane sphingolipid transport. No canonical Lpt component is significantly down at transcript level.

The tension lives in the single-replicate OM proteome (REPORT §Finding 4 protein table): LptD (CCNA_01760) log2(4672/4659) = −0.47 and LptE (CCNA_03866) = −0.78 — both decline at protein level despite stable/up transcripts. A parsimonious interpretation: with no LPS substrate, canonical LPS-specific Lpt machinery may be less occupied or actively turned over. But single-replicate proteomics cannot discriminate substrate-limitation from active downregulation; the verdict is DISCORDANT, not PASS.

Pilot signals not shown in the figure (speaker background): lptC2 (CCNA_01226) transcript −0.60 FDR 0.034, protein log2(4672/4659) = +1.08 vs intermediate (+0.66 vs WT baseline after accounting for prior −0.42 step) — labeled PILOT, requires replication. CCNA_01217 protein +0.77 vs intermediate, +0.74 vs WT — a second directional pilot datum. CtpA (CCNA_03113) REJECTED at pre-registered bar: FDR 0.109 (fails lower bound of 0.05), protein not detected in OM proteome.

revision_log.summary: Converted layout from data_table to data_figure using NB04_lpt_apparatus_heatmap.png; title and caption reframed around A14/A15 (Lpt transcript maintained/up vs LptD/LptE protein discordance); pilot data (lptC2/CCNA_01217 PILOTs, CtpA REJECTED) moved to speaker_notes_seed; restores S3 substory plan’s data_figure slot for A14/A15 as specified in 02_substories.md.
